💌
You have a special surprise
waiting for you!
✨ tap to open ✨
🫂 💕 🫂
Wrapping you in the
warmest virtual hug! 🤗
I wish I could hold you for real...
but until then, feel my arms around you 💕
💋
Mwaaah! 💋✨
A million kisses for you!
Each one carries all my love
across every mile between us 💕
I Love You
More than all the miles
between us 💕
You are my everything,
my today & all of my tomorrows 🌟
👑
Happy Birthday My Love!
🎂 Wishing you the most magical day ever! 🎂
25

✨ April 21, 2026 ✨

💕 Until your special day! 💕
✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
🎂 Make a Wish & Blow!
🎂
✨ Tap the cake to blow out the candles! ✨ 🎤 Or blow into your mic for the real magic!
✨🌟 Your wish will come true! 🌟✨
Happy Birthday, beautiful soul! 🎂💕
Every candle holds a piece of my love for you 🕯️❤️
🎵 Our Song
A Thousand Years
Christina Perri
🎵 Tap to play our melody
✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
💌 A Letter From My Heart
My Dearest Love,
Happy Birthday to the most incredible person in my entire world! 🌍💕

Even though oceans and time zones separate us, you are always right here in my heart — the first thought when I wake, and the last whisper before I sleep. Every ping of your message makes my heart skip. Every video call is the highlight of my day. 📱✨

On this beautiful day, I want you to know — distance means absolutely nothing when someone means absolutely everything. You are that everything to me. You are my favorite notification, my most beautiful good morning, and the reason I smile at my phone like a fool. 🥰

I'm counting every single second until I can finally hold you, breathe you in, and never let go. Until then, please accept every virtual hug, every digital kiss, and every piece of love I can possibly send through this screen. 🤗💋

May this year bring you endless happiness, overflowing love, and every dream your beautiful heart desires. You deserve the moon, the stars, and the entire universe. 🌙⭐🌌

I love you more than all the miles between us, more than all the time zones that try to separate us, and more than words could ever express. 💕

Happy Birthday, my beautiful love! 🎂🎈🎉
Forever & Always Yours,
Your Love 💕
💕 💗 💖 💝 💕
✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦

✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
🎁 A Special Surprise
🎁
✨ Tap to unwrap your surprise! ✨
🌟 Surprise! 🌟
I promise you... one beautiful day,
the distance will close forever. 🌍✈️💕

And when that day comes,
I'll hold you so tight
you'll feel every hug
you ever missed. 🤗💖

Until then...
every sunset we share,
every "good morning" text,
every late-night call...
is a thread weaving our
love story together. 🌅📱🌙

I love you endlessly. 💕
📝 Little Love Notes
📌 I miss your hugs the most. One day, no more screens between us! 🤗💕
📌 My favorite sound in the world? Your laugh on our video calls 📱😂💕
📌 Things I love about you: Your smile, your voice, your kindness, your EVERYTHING! 😍✨
📌 Can't wait to fall asleep next to you instead of on a call 🌙💕
📌 You make 3,000 miles feel like 3 inches. That's the power of our love! 💪💕
📌 Happy Birthday to my favorite human on this entire planet! 🌍🎂🥳
✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
💫 Our Love Story
💬 The Day We Met
The moment that changed everything... when two hearts found each other across the distance ✨💕
💕 First "I Love You"
Three little words, one big feeling... the night we both knew this was forever 🌙❤️
🎮 First Virtual Date
Netflix, snacks, video call... same movie, different countries, one love 🍿📱
😭💕 First Visit
Finally holding you for real... the airport hug that lasted forever and felt like coming home 🤗✈️
🎂 April 21, 2026 — TODAY!
Celebrating YOU from afar, loving you with everything I have! This is your day, beautiful! 🎈🎉💕
🔮 Our Future
No more distance. Same city. Same home. Same bed. Same forever. I can't wait! 🏠💕✨
🎈 Birthday Wishes For You
🎂
"Happy Birthday! May every wish you make today come true, and may your smile never fade! 🌟"
~ With All My Love
🎈
"Wishing you a day filled with as much joy and warmth as you bring into my life every single day! 💕"
~ Your Forever Person
🌟
"Another year of being the most amazing, beautiful, incredible person I've ever known! 🥳"
~ Always & Forever Yours
💝
"You deserve the world and more. I hope this birthday is just the beginning of your best year yet! 🌈✨"
~ Your Biggest Fan
✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
💕 🌏 ✈️ 🌍 💕
Made with every piece of my heart,
wrapped in love & sent across the miles
just for you, my love 💕
Distance is just a test to see how far love can travel 💌
🌸 A Sweet Way to Feel Close, Even From Afar 🌸
